info.name: WebSankul — Admin API
info.description:
Module-wise Admin API collection.

## Setup
1. Create a Postman **Environment** and set `BASEURL` (e.g. `http://192.168.0.5/api/v1` is WRONG — use just the host root WITHOUT the path, e.g. `http://192.168.0.5` ... actually BASEURL must be the host+scheme only because each request already includes `/api/v1/admin/...`). Example value: `http://192.168.0.5` or `https://api.websankul.com`.
2. Run **Auth > POST Admin Login**. A test script auto-saves the JWT into the collection variable `{{token}}`.
3. All other requests inherit Bearer `{{token}}` automatically.

Auth: collection-level Bearer with `{{token}}`. Public routes (login/refresh) use No Auth.

exec: // Auto-store auth token after a successful login.
console.warn('Login response had no recognizable token field; set {{token}} manually.');
console.warn('Could not parse login response as JSON:', e.message);
